gist.headline: TeleChars AI joins the library
gist.blurb: A new community app has sprouted! TeleChars AI is now available in the showcase for inline text editing and character attribute revisions.
gist.summary: Added TeleChars AI to the community apps showcase, providing a new tool for inline text editing and character development.
gist.impact: Writers and creators can now discover and use TeleChars AI to seamlessly edit text and refine character details.
gist.visual_concept: TeleChars AI focuses on writing and character attributes. Visuals: A cozy library or writing desk. The pollinations bee (Polly) wearing tiny reading glasses, looking at a glowing manuscript or a character sheet. Lime green accents on the desk lamp or glowing text.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee wearing tiny reading glasses, hovering over a wooden writing desk with a glowing manuscript. A chunky retro monitor displays character stats in bright lime green (#ecf874). Soft pastel lavender and cream gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.
